name: floecat.core.cache.accounts
description: Number of accounts with an active cache entry, tagged by cache name.

name: floecat.core.cache.enabled
description: Indicator that the cache is enabled (1=enabled, 0=disabled).

name: floecat.core.cache.entries
description: Approximate number of entries in the cache, tagged by cache name.

name: floecat.core.cache.errors
description: Number of cache operation failures (load errors), tagged by cache name.

name: floecat.core.cache.hits
description: Number of cache lookup hits, tagged by cache name.

name: floecat.core.cache.latency
description: Cache latency distribution for operations.

name: floecat.core.cache.max.entries
description: Configured max entries for the cache.

name: floecat.core.cache.max.weight.bytes
description: Configured maximum weight (bytes) for the cache.

name: floecat.core.cache.misses
description: Number of cache lookup misses, tagged by cache name.

name: floecat.core.cache.weighted.size.bytes
description: Total weight (bytes) of cache entries, tagged by cache name.

name: floecat.core.exec.active
description: Number of threads actively executing tasks per pool.

name: floecat.core.exec.queue.depth
description: Number of work items waiting in the executor queue per pool.

name: floecat.core.exec.rejected
description: Number of task submissions rejected by the executor.

name: floecat.core.exec.task.run
description: Duration spent running the task on a worker thread.

name: floecat.core.exec.task.wait
description: Duration spent waiting in the queue before execution starts.

name: floecat.core.gc.collections
description: Number of GC collections per GC type.

name: floecat.core.gc.errors
description: GC failures per GC type.

name: floecat.core.gc.pause
description: GC pause time per GC type.

name: floecat.core.gc.retries
description: GC retries per component/operation.

name: floecat.core.observability.dropped.metric.total
description: Total number of metric emissions rejected because validation failed.

name: floecat.core.observability.dropped.tags.total
description: Total number of tags dropped because they violated telemetry contracts.

name: floecat.core.observability.duplicate.gauge.total
description: Count of duplicate gauge registration attempts.

name: floecat.core.observability.invalid.metric.total
description: Total number of metrics rejected because they were not registered.

name: floecat.core.observability.registry.size
description: Current size of the telemetry registry.

name: floecat.core.rpc.active
description: Number of in-flight RPCs per component/operation.

name: floecat.core.rpc.errors
description: Count of RPC failures per component/operation.

name: floecat.core.rpc.latency
description: Latency distribution for RPC operations.

name: floecat.core.rpc.requests
description: Total RPC requests processed, tagged by account and status.

name: floecat.core.rpc.retries
description: Number of RPC retries invoked.

name: floecat.core.store.bytes
description: Count of bytes processed by store operations.

name: floecat.core.store.errors
description: Store failure count per component/operation.

name: floecat.core.store.latency
description: Store operation latency distribution.

name: floecat.core.store.requests
description: Number of store requests emitted per component/operation.

name: floecat.core.store.retries
description: Store retries per component/operation.

name: floecat.core.task.enabled
description: Indicator that a scheduled task is enabled (1=enabled, 0=disabled).

name: floecat.core.task.last.tick.end.ms
description: Timestamp (ms since epoch) when the scheduled task last finished a tick.

name: floecat.core.task.last.tick.start.ms
description: Timestamp (ms since epoch) when the scheduled task last started a tick.

name: floecat.core.task.running
description: Number of active ticks for the scheduled task (usually 0 or 1).

name: floecat.jvm.gc.live.data.bytes
description: Estimated live data (bytes) held by each garbage collector.

name: floecat.jvm.gc.live.data.growth.rate
description: Live data growth rate (bytes/second) for GC-managed pools.

name: floecat.profiling.captures.total
description: Profiling capture lifecycle counts (started/completed/failed/dropped).

name: floecat.service.flight.cancelled.total
description: Flight request cancellations by operation, table, and reason.

name: floecat.service.flight.errors.total
description: Flight request failures by operation, table, and reason.

name: floecat.service.flight.inflight
description: Current number of in-flight Flight streams.

name: floecat.service.flight.latency
description: Flight request latency by operation, table, and terminal status.

name: floecat.service.flight.requests.total
description: Total Flight requests by operation, table, and terminal status.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.cancel_job.total
description: CancelReconcileJob request outcomes.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.capture_now.total
description: CaptureNow request outcomes by trigger type.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.errors.total
description: Errors recorded by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.get_job.total
description: GetReconcileJob request outcomes.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.get_settings.total
description: GetReconcilerSettings request outcomes.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.job.latency
description: Reconcile job terminal latency by execution mode.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.jobs.cancelling
description: Current number of reconcile jobs waiting for cancellation.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.jobs.queued
description: Current number of queued reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.jobs.running
description: Current number of running reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.jobs.total
description: Reconcile job terminal outcomes by execution mode.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.list_jobs.total
description: ListReconcileJobs request outcomes.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.planner.enqueue.total
description: Automatic reconcile planner enqueue decisions by mode.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.planner.tick.latency
description: Automatic reconcile planner tick latency.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.planner.ticks.total
description: Automatic reconcile planner tick outcomes.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.queue.oldest_age
description: Age in milliseconds of the oldest queued reconcile job.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.snapshots_processed.total
description: Snapshots processed by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.start_capture.total
description: StartCapture request outcomes by trigger type.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.stats_processed.total
description: Statistics payloads processed by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.tables_changed.total
description: Tables changed by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.tables_scanned.total
description: Tables scanned by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.update_settings.total
description: UpdateReconcilerSettings request outcomes.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.views_changed.total
description: Views changed by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.reconcile.views_scanned.total
description: Views scanned by reconcile jobs.

name: floecat.service.stats.batch_groups.total
description: Stats batch request groups processed.

name: floecat.service.stats.batch_items.total
description: Stats batch item counters (untagged series tracks submitted items; tagged series with result=* tracks per-outcome items; query with result tag filters to avoid double-counting).

name: floecat.service.stats.engine_batch_calls.total
description: Stats engine batch capture calls.

name: floecat.service.stats.store_hits.total
description: Stats store hit count for batch resolution.

name: floecat.service.stats.store_misses.total
description: Stats store miss count for batch resolution.

name: floecat.service.storage.account.bytes
description: Estimated per-account storage byte consumption (sampled, not exact).

name: floecat.service.storage.account.pointers
description: Per-account pointer count stored in the service.
